== Notes for [[Item:Q113455|Q113455]] ==

< [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fernando_Bermúdez_de_Cea Wikipedia] > '''Fernando Bermúdez''' (died c. 978), the second Count of Cea, was the son of Bermudo Núñez and his wife Argilo.[1][2][a] As the father of a queen of Navarre, and therefore, ancestor of many royal houses, Fernando was a distinguished member of the highest ranks of the nobility of the Kingdom of León.


Marriage and issue

He married Elvira Díaz, daughter of Diego Muñoz, count of Saldaña, and his wife Tregidia.[7][b] They were the parents of:[8]

# Pedro Fernández (died ca. 1028), the third Count of Cea and lacking a male heir, the agnate line of the counts of Cea was extinguished. With his wife, Sancha Muñoz, he had only one daughter named Elvira Pérez.[9]
# Gómez Fernández (died before 978),[9] was the husband of Onecca and father of Countess Onecca Gómez, wife of Count Fortún who was most likely a member of the royal house of Pamplona. He was probably the father of Fernando and Rodrigo Gómez.[9][c]
# Gotina Fernández, the wife of Count Pelayo Rodríguez.[11]
# Jimena Fernández, Queen consort as the wife of King García Sánchez II and mother of King Sancho III of Navarre.[11]
# Justa Fernández, the first wife of Count Flaín Muñoz.[11]
# Elvira Fernández.[11]

Conde

SOURCE NOTES:
www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/cgi-bin/gedlkup/n=royal?royal10960

RESEARCH NOTES:
Count of Bermudez

Conde

1 NAME el Major //
2 GIVN el Major
2 SURN
2 NICK el Major

1 NAME el Major //
2 GIVN el Major
2 SURN
2 NICK el Major

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Count

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Count

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
